tasks.label: Check Azure Functions Core Tools Installation
args: source ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || true; if command -v func &> /dev/null; then echo "✓ Azure Functions Core Tools is installed at: $(which func)"; exit 0; else echo ""; echo "❌ ERROR: Azure Functions Core Tools is not installed!"; echo ""; echo "Install with: brew tap azure/functions && brew install azure-functions-core-tools@4"; echo ""; exit 1; fi

if (Get-Command func -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'Azure Functions Core Tools is installed'; exit 0 } else { Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'ERROR: Azure Functions Core Tools is not installed!'; Write-Host 'Install: npm i -g azure-functions-core-tools@4 --unsafe-perm true'; Write-Host 'or use Chocolatey: choco install azure-functions-core-tools-4'; Write-Host ''; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Ensure local.settings.json (functions)
args: target="${workspaceFolder}/CruSibyl.Functions/local.settings.json"; template="${workspaceFolder}/CruSibyl.Functions/local.settings.json.template"; if [ -f "$target" ]; then echo "local.settings.json found"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$template" ]; then cp "$template" "$target"; echo "Created local.settings.json from template"; echo "Update secrets/config before running production-like syncs."; exit 0; fi; echo "ERROR: Missing local.settings.json and local.settings.json.template"; exit 1

$root='${workspaceFolder}'; $target=Join-Path $root 'CruSibyl.Functions\local.settings.json'; $template=Join-Path $root 'CruSibyl.Functions\local.settings.json.template'; if (Test-Path $target) { Write-Host 'local.settings.json found'; exit 0 }; if (Test-Path $template) { Copy-Item $template $target; Write-Host 'Created local.settings.json from template'; Write-Host 'Update secrets/config before running production-like syncs.'; exit 0 }; Write-Host 'ERROR: Missing local.settings.json and local.settings.json.template'; exit 1

tasks.label: Check Azurite Installation
args: source ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || true; if command -v azurite &> /dev/null; then echo "✓ Azurite is installed at: $(which azurite)"; exit 0; else echo ""; echo "❌ ERROR: Azurite is not installed!"; echo ""; echo "Please install Azurite using one of these methods:"; echo "  npm install -g azurite"; echo "  brew install azurite"; echo ""; echo "For more info: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage/common/storage-use-azurite"; echo ""; exit 1; fi

if (Get-Command azurite -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'Azurite is installed'; exit 0 } else { Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'ERROR: Azurite is not installed!'; Write-Host 'Install: npm install -g azurite'; Write-Host ''; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Verify Azurite Ports
args: for p in 10000 10001 10002; do ok=0; for i in {1..20}; do if nc -z 127.0.0.1 "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1; then ok=1; break; fi; sleep 0.25; done; if [ "$ok" -ne 1 ]; then echo "ERROR: Azurite port $p is not reachable"; exit 1; fi; done; echo "Azurite ports are reachable"

$ports = @(10000,10001,10002); foreach ($p in $ports) { $ok = $false; for ($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++) { try { $c = New-Object Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $c.Connect('127.0.0.1',$p); $c.Close(); $ok = $true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 250 } }; if (-not $ok) { Write-Host "ERROR: Azurite port $p is not reachable"; exit 1 } }; Write-Host 'Azurite ports are reachable'
$p = Get-Process azurite -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { $p | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0

tasks.label: Stop Functions Host (Port 7071)
args: PIDS=$(lsof -ti tcp:7071 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then echo "Stopping process(es) on port 7071: $PIDS"; echo "$PIDS" | xargs kill >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else echo "No process listening on port 7071"; fi

$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 7071 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ("Stopped process on port 7071: " + $_) } } else { Write-Host 'No process listening on port 7071' }

tasks.label: Start Functions with Azurite
dependsOn: Check Azure Functions Core Tools Installation
